patch_history.raw: Gatecrash Duration beacon is active reduced 30s >> 15s Blindside Charges reduced from 2 >> 1. v

Dimensional Drift and Gatecrash Fixed a rare bug where Yoru could use and instantly cancel Dimensional Drift by casting Gatecrash right as the buy phase barrier dropped. Fakeout Fixed a bug where the clone could be pushed away by Veto’s Chokehold if Chokehold was on an elevated surface. v
Dimensional Drift Fixed a bug where using it while attaching to an ascender would cause him to get stuck in an animation loop. v

Fakeout Clone will now properly show suppression VFX when affected by suppression. Blindside Observers are now able to see it immediately instead of after it bounces. Will display the correct color VFX when there are two Yoru’s in the same match. Fixed bug where the audio was audible by enemies while stealthed. v

all_changes.context_label: will now properly show suppression VFX when affected by suppression
all_changes.description: will now properly show suppression VFX when affected by suppression

patch_history.raw: Fakeout Fixed a bug where it wasn’t being destroyed by abilities if it took lethal damage Fixed a bug where it didn’t collide with things in the game as if it were a player v

Gatecrash Health decreased from 60 >>> 20 Audio now plays from Yoru’s location when Yoru teleports or fakes it Fakeout Flash duration decreased from 3s >>> 2s Blindside Flash duration decreased from 1.75s >>> 1.5s Flash now follows the standard flash falloff curves as other Agents. Previously, the flashes that were slightly offscreen were more effective than intended Dimensional Drift Can no longer cast Blindside, or set up his Fakeout during Dimensional Drift. He can still cast the initial Gatecrash and reactivation, as well as reactivation of Fakeouts v

patch_history.raw: Dimensional Drift Fixed a bug where in very specific set of circumstances after turning invisible, he would reappear in his original location when the invisibility ends. v

Gatecrash Fixed an issue where the in-world icon would not change color when aimed at. Dimensional Drift Fixed a bug where in some cases after turning invisible, he would reappear in his original location when the invisibility ends. v
Gatecrash Fixed a bug that caused Yoru’s right hand to glow if an enemy Yoru equipped his Gatecrash within a certain range. v
Blindside Fixed an issue where the visual decals would linger on walls they bounced off of v
Fakeout Reverted a bugfix that caused Yoru’s clone to slightly mismatch normal player movement when running into walls. Dimensional Drift Duration reduced 12s >>> 10s Point cost 7 >>> 8 v

patch_history.raw: Fakeout Cost increase 100 >>> 200 credits v

all_changes.context_label: Fakeout Cost increase

patch_history.raw: Dimensional Drift Fixed a bug where Yoru could pick up KAY/O with NULL/cmd active during Dimensional Drift Fixed a bug where Yoru would hold the Nocturnum scythe incorrectly after using Dimensional Drift v

Fakeout Blind abilities like ’s Dizzy and ’s Arc Rose will now display the blind effect on Yoru’s Fakeout clone as if he was a real Agent. Vyse will play her Successful Blind celebration lines when blinding Yoru’s Fakeout clone. ’s Neural Theft will show the Yoru’s Fakeout clone. ’s Meddle will now show the decay effect on Yoru’s Fakeout clone. v
Fakeout Enemy agents will callout image on sight as if it is any other enemy agent, albeit using the generic "Enemy spotted" voiceline. This is an undocumented change v
Gatecrash Teleport will now be properly interrupted when suppressed mid-animation v
Fakeout Can now be visually affected when hit by Concuss abiltiies. v

all_changes.context_label: Can now be visually affected when hit by Concuss abiltiies
all_changes.description: Can now be visually affected when hit by Concuss abiltiies

patch_history.raw: Fakeout Fixed an issue where Yoru’s Fakeout would min flash you if you were outside of its conal range of effect. Fixed a bug where Yoru’s Fakeout echo would sometimes not have a weapon equipped. The weapon that Yoru’s Fakeout echo equips should now use a more accurate weapons skin. v
Dimensional Drift Fixed an issue where Yoru couldn’t drop his weapon while using Dimensional Drift. v
Adjusted hair height to fit within standardized vertical range v
Fakeout Fixed a bug where Fakeout could get stuck in mid-air in various locations v
Fakeout Now immune to all allied damage Gatecrash Health decreased 100 HP >>> 60 HP Cost decreased 200 >>> 150 Now immune to all allied damage v

patch_history.raw: Gatecrash Fixed a bug where Gatecrash would sometimes leave floor markers in incorrect locations v
Dimensional Drift Increased duration of ultimate 10s >>> 12s Reduced unequip time 1.2s >>> 0.8s Fixed a bug where the invulnerability kicked in later than intended after it was cast v

patch_history.raw: Dimensional Drift Fixed a bug where Yoru could use weapons earlier than intended when exiting Dimensional Drift Fixed a bug where the mask would flicker while running forward during Dimensional Drift v
Progress/Charge bars moved to a consistent location and made a consistent size Gatecrash Voice lines relating to Gatecrash will now be heard globally by allies v

Gatecrash Fixed a bug where Yoru could use Gatecrash to teleport out of bounds Dimensional Drift Fixed various exploits allowing Yoru to use weapons before fully decloaking at the end of Dimensional Drift v

Dimensional Drift Fixed a bug where Yoru could use a weapon immediately after Dimensional Drift ended by exploiting an unwanted interaction with ropes [https://twitter.com/PlayVALORANT/status/1499170886150066178 v
Hotfix] Dimensional Drift Fixed issues with Dimensional Drift not acting as intended v

Fakeout - Reworked Charges reduced from 2 >>> 1 Decoy HP: 150 Decoy is now a full running version of Yoru and can only be sent running forward Right-click to place a stationary marker for the decoy Reactivate similarly to footsteps to create the decoy that runs forward Upon taking damage from an enemy gun, the decoy winds up, turns towards the enemy that shot it, and explodes after a short delay.
